title: Manufacturing Engineer - Reckitt India Holdings Services - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Reckitt India Holdings Services - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
We at Reckitt India Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Chandigarh. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Reckitt India Holdings Services:
Reckitt India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reckitt India Holdings Services!
